body_txt: There are Ad Hominem insults. There are Lame Comebacks . And then there are these — insults so trite and meaningless that one may as well have called the other person a "Big Stupid Doodoo Head". Young children will resort to using these because they either don't know any better, or have run out of things to say. When an adult uses these, however, it's a good sign that they either don't have any real substance to back up their argument or they are quite childish themselves. The best-case scenario for the insulter is that the insult makes it clear, not that they lack verbal ammo, but that the target dramatically doesn't deserve any. In such a case the target might get more angry than if they had been called something more vulgar and/or creative. Other variants include "butthead", " snotbrain ", " turdwipe " or - if the insulter is really desperate - borderline politically incorrect namecalling ("gay", etc.). Sometimes Played for Laughs when it induces Felony Misdemeanor . Often involves Buffy Speak . The Bratty Half-Pint and the Manchild are fond of this. See also No, You , really the only appropriate comeback to such an insult. Also see Badbutt and Gosh Dang It to Heck! , with which this can overlap. Flowery Insults are on the opposite end of the spectrum. Compare and contrast Curse of The Ancients , which is about insults (and curses in general) used by old people, putting it on the opposite end of the age spectrum.
